---
name: reactbits-components
description: "Discover and integrate React Bits and shadcn-compatible UI components. Use when user asks for component ideas, animated backgrounds, UI effects, or requests to add/install a specific component."
---

# React Bits Components

## When to use
- User asks for animated UI/background/text effects.
- User wants to find or compare ready-made components.
- User asks to install/add a component quickly instead of building from scratch.

## Procedure
1. Use MCP component discovery tools first to find relevant components by category or keyword.
2. Pick components that match project constraints and existing styling.
3. If user asks to apply a component, install and wire it into the requested page/section.
4. Mention required dependencies and usage notes after integration.

## Selection preferences
- For visual effects and animated sections, prioritize React Bits catalog.
- For project installation flows, use shadcn-compatible install paths and registry items.
